response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development, but their background is heavily skewed toward dynamic languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, D) and lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development experience on Windows, which is mandatory for this role. Additionally, there is no evidence of domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking, nor any mention of SQL Server or Oracle experience.
strengths: Strong general software development skills with a focus on test-driven development and software craftsmanship.
Experience with CI/CD pipelines and dev-ops infrastructure setup.
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and frameworks.
concerns: No demonstrated C++ experience on Windows platform within the last 10 years.
Lacks domain expertise in capital markets, investment banking, or fixed income.
No experience with SQL Server or Oracle, as required by the job description.

key_factors.factor: Domain expertise in Fixed Income/Capital Markets
